body_txt: A beautiful character is punished by being turned ugly, which is a Fate Worse than Death . Usually a punishment for vanity, but not necessarily. See also Beauty to Beast , which is the general trope of a beautiful person turning ugly for whatever reason, including plain old-fashioned aging. Related to Beauty Equals Goodness and Karmic Transformation . Original tales of Bewitched Amphibians were often aiming at this. See also Tarnishing Their Own Beauty for when this is self-inflicted. Can overlap with Ugly All Along where the beautiful character is actually ugly, but is using make-up or magic to hide their ugliness, and they are punished by having their true appearance publicly exposed to their former fans. If done at the end of a work, it may cross over with Climactic Maiming .
